debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
hk : 0 < k
S : Finset ℕ
hS : ∀ p ∈ S, Odd p ∧ Nat.Prime p
p₁ p₂ : Fin S.card ≃ ↥S
hp₁ : Imo2022P3.Condition k S p₁
hp₂ : Imo2022P3.Condition k S p₂
⊢ (∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j + i)) ∨ ∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j.rev + i)

failed_attempts:
rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos #S with hc | hc
  · left; exact ⟨0, fun j => (hc ▸ j).elim0⟩
  · haveI : NeZero #S := ⟨hc.ne'⟩
    left
    use 0
    intro j
    simp only [add_zero]
    have hp₁j := hp₁ j
    have hp₂j := hp₂ j
    congr 1
    ext
    sorry

left; use 0; intro j; simp only [add_zero]; exact sorry

classical
  by_cases hcard : #S = 0
  · left; exact ⟨0, fun j => (hcard ▸ j).elim0⟩
  · haveI : NeZero #S := ⟨hcard⟩
    by_cases hcard1 : #S = 1
    · left
      refine ⟨0, fun j => ?_⟩
      have hj : j = 0 := Fin.ext (Nat.lt_one_iff.mp (hcard1 ▸ j.isLt))
      subst hj
      congr 1
      have := Finset.card_eq_one.mp hcard1
      obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := this
      have h1 : (p₁ 0 : ℕ) = a := Finset.mem_singleton.mp (ha ▸ (p₁ 0).prop)
      have h2 : (p₂ 0 : ℕ) = a := Finset.mem_singleton.mp (ha ▸ (p₂ 0).prop)
      exact Subtype.ext (h2.trans h1.symm)
    · sorry

rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos #S with hc | hc
  · left; exact ⟨0, fun j => (hc ▸ j).elim0⟩
  · rcases Nat.lt_or_ge #S 2 with hc2 | hc2
    · left
      refine ⟨0, fun j => ?_⟩
      have : #S = 1 := Nat.lt_two_iff_one_or_zero.mp hc2 |>.resolve_right hc.ne'
      have : Subsingleton (Fin #S) := by simp only [this]; infer_instance
      simp only [add_zero]
      congr 1
      exact Subsingleton.elim _ _
    · sorry
